title: Aaduladan Padalai Kaettu Lyrics Motta Shiva Ketta Shiva
stanzas:
Aaduladan Padalai Kaettu (remix) Lyrics Motta Shiva Ketta Shiva
#ShankarMahadevan #Padmalatha

You..
Puratichi thalaivar
Ponmana chemmal
makkal thilagam
Doctor MGR-in
kudi irundha kovil song remix
dedicated to all Cinema fans

Aaduladan padalai kaettu
rasipathilethaan
sugam sugam sugam.
ishaa haa haa haa hoi

aasai tharum paarvaiyil
ellaam aayiram ennam
varum varum varum
ishaa ishaa ishaa ishaa hoi

aasai tharum paarvaiyil
ellaam aayiram ennam
varum varum varum

aasai tharum paarvaiyil
ellaam aayiram ennam
varum varum varum

M G rippa rippa ah
people politician
representing the city
of kind
... never forgot it
you're the people
champion
the real ..ever known

kannarugil  penmai kudiyaera
kai azhagil ilamai thadumaara
thennai ilaneeril padhamaaga
ondru naan tharavaa
idhamaaga.

senganiyil thalaivan pasi aara
thindra idam thaenin suvai oora
pangu pera varavaa
thunaiyaaga. ..

manam oonjalin meedhu
poo mazhai thoovida
uriyavan neethaane.

dance to the beat
hit the kicks down
hey shake it to the rhythm
let the pitch count
yei chocolate honey
get the speaker ..
kudiyirundha kovil.
... love

kallirukkum malare
valaindhaadu.
kalaippaara madiyil
idam podu
ullirukkum ninaivil
uravaadu
ulagaiye marandhu
vilaiyaadu....

vimmi varum azhagil
nadaipodu
vandhirukkum manadhai
edai podu
vendiyathai tharalaam
thunivaodu..

un paarvaiyile
naa oorvalam varuven
pudhumaiyai nee paadu.

Aaduladan ah..
Aaduladan  ah..

rasipathilethaan

ishaa haa haa haa hoi

enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the electrifying beats of Aaduladan Padalai Kaettu from the movie Motta Shiva Ketta Shiva. This remix track, composed by Amresh Ganesh, captures the vibrant energy of Tamil cinema. Dive into the rhythm and let the music elevate your spirits!
stanzaMeanings: A remix of the song 'Aaduladan Padalai Kaettu' from the movie Motta Shiva Ketta Shiva.
You.. The leader of the public, the beloved leader, Doctor MGR's temple song remix dedicated to all cinema fans.
Only in the joy of the song 'Aaduladan Padalai Kaettu' can one find happiness, happiness, happiness. Isaa haa haa haa hoi.
In the gaze that gives desire, a thousand thoughts will come, come, come. Isaa ishaa ishaa ishaa hoi.
In the gaze that gives desire, a thousand thoughts will come, come, come.
Only in the joy of the song 'Aaduladan Padalai Kaettu' can one find happiness, happiness, happiness.
In the gaze that gives desire, a thousand thoughts will come, come, come.
M.G. is a true representative of the people, a politician who never forgets the city... you are the people's champion, the real one ever known.
In the eyes of the beautiful girl, the beauty of youth is like a sweet nectar, I will give you something special.
In the heart of the leader, there is a place for hunger, the taste of sweetness will come to the place where the community gathers.
You are the one who will make the flowers rain on the swing of the heart.
Dance to the beat, hit the kicks down, shake it to the rhythm, let the pitch count, hey chocolate honey, get the speaker... the temple of the community... love.
The flower that blooms in the stones, place it in the lap of the artist, in the thoughts that dwell within, the world forgets and plays.
With beauty that comes from afar, the heart will be filled with what is needed.
In your gaze, I will come to the town, you will sing something new.
Dance, dance, dance... Only in the joy of the song 'Aaduladan Padalai Kaettu' can one find happiness, happiness, happiness. Isaa haa haa haa hoi.
In the gaze that gives desire, a thousand thoughts will come, come, come. Isaa ishaa ishaa ishaa hoi.
In the gaze that gives desire, a thousand thoughts will come, come, come.
enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Aaduladan Padalai Kaettu?

The song celebrates the joy and excitement of life, reflecting the vibrant spirit of the movie Motta Shiva Ketta Shiva.

Who are the lead actors in Motta Shiva Ketta Shiva?

The lead actor is Shiva and the lead actress is Nikki Galrani.

Who composed the music for Aaduladan Padalai Kaettu?

The music for the song was composed by Amresh Ganesh.

When was the song Aaduladan Padalai Kaettu released?

The song was released on February 28, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the energetic dance number Aaduladan Padalai Kaettu, featured in the film Motta Shiva Ketta Shiva, lead actor Shiva and actress Nikki Galrani bring a lively spirit to the screen. The song captures the essence of celebration and joy, making it perfect for parties and weddings. Its upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of happiness and excitement, inviting listeners to join in the fun. This vibrant track is a testament to the film's overall energetic vibe and entertainment value.
